title: selaginella nivea subsp. humbertii
intro: Selaginella nivea subsp. humbertii, also known as the Madagascar spikemoss, is a type of evergreen, non-vascular plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, Selaginella nivea subsp. humbertii is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
